source: Remediation sequence C1-C6 (fresh-eyes audit 2026-06-06); filed for later manual implementation. See docs/PROJECT_MAP.md and the approved plan.
title: Slim pi_agent.py: extract logging / awareness-cache / prompt assembly (C6)
what_failed: pi_agent.py (~1,300 lines) concentrates state, logging infra, awareness cache, prompt assembly, routing and exit - hard to reason about, and the soil C1 divergence grows in.
where_failed: pi_agent.py - the PiAgent class doing ~12 jobs.
why_likely: The agent accreted responsibilities as features landed.
migration_plan: 1. Extract cohesive units behind the SAME public surface: logging infra, awareness cache, prompt assembly (some already in agent/prompt.py).
2. One extraction per commit; coherence gate green each time.
3. Target: PiAgent orchestrates; details live in focused modules.
implementation_notes: Smart and simple: extract, do not redesign. Public behavior unchanged; gate green each step. Lowest urgency - debt, not breakage.
analysis: Mostly enabled by C1 (T-162). Do it incrementally; never big-bang the agent.
